item.title: Moltbot - Personal AI Assistant
item.description: Self-hosted AI assistant connected to GitHub, web search, and more.

item.title: Aegis
item.description: The Operating System for Your AI Life

item.title: CarbonOS - Climate Compliance Infrastructure
item.description: The operating system for corporate climate compliance. Track, report, and reduce emissions. Comply with EU CSRD, SEC rules, and CA SB 253 without spreadsheets or consultants.

item.title: CaseBrief - AI Legal Workflow Platform
item.description: The AI associate that never sleeps. Automate legal research, contract analysis, discovery, and brief drafting. 10x lawyer productivity while maintaining the accuracy clients demand.

item.title: Civitas - AI Infrastructure for Citizen Services
item.description: The Palantir of citizen services. Proactive government that finds benefits for you, not the other way around.

item.title: MedGraph - AI Infrastructure for Healthcare Operations
item.description: The Palantir of hospital operations. AI that connects fragmented healthcare systems and optimizes clinical workflows.

item.title: Prism
item.description: The Trust Layer for the AI Age

item.title: Veritas - AI-Powered Alumni Network
item.description: The trusted professional network where credentials are verified and connections are warm. LinkedIn is everyone. Veritas is your people.
